name: Biscuit
desc: Arrived skinny and shy but has blossomed into a tail-wagging, food-motivated sweetheart. Good with calm dogs. Ready for a patient home.

name: Pepper
desc: Street cat found near New Kingston. Fully vaccinated, spayed, and now thoroughly convinced that laps exist for her comfort alone.

name: Rum
desc: Big personality, medium size. Rum came in after Hurricane Mellissa and is currently in foster care. Loves long walks and hates being ignored.

name: Sugar
desc: Found as a tiny pup near Portmore. Sugar is bold, bouncy, and will need basic training — but she learns fast and loves everyone she meets.

name: Patchy
desc: A calico-patterned gentleman who has been waiting quietly for the right home. Calm, observant, and happiest with a window perch and a warm spot to sleep.
